name: mini-terminal-demo
title: Mini Terminal Demo
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Compact animated terminal card with copy-to-clipboard, pin support, and stagger delay. Exports DemoEntry and DemoScenario types.
docs: Define a `DemoScenario` with entries (input, output, tool-call, claude) and pass it as the `scenario` prop. Set `play` to true to start the animation.
